title: Flaky Roasted Venezuelan Chicken Empanadas
description: A delicious and flaky roasted Venezuelan dish featuring whole black peppercorns and a soffritto base, perfect for a date night, and friendly to dairy free diets. This recipe combines the flavors of Venezuela with a twist of roasted chicken.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine flour, salt, and whole black peppercorns to make the empanada dough.
Gradually add the egg replacement and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch and cut out circles of dough.
Place a tablespoon of soffritto base and a piece of roasted chicken in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half and press the edges to seal the empanada.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with olive oil and bake for 20 minutes.
Serve the empanadas hot and enjoy.
Note: to make the soffritto base, saute 1 onion, 2 cloves of garlic, and 1 cup of mixed vegetables in olive oil until the vegetables are tender.
